title: Winey Wholesome Kenyan Chickpeas Curry
description: A vibrant brunch dish that blends Kenyan flair with a wine-infused, glassy-jelly curry, featuring panang paste and coconut cream for a flexitarian twist.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the panang curry paste and sauté for 1 minute, letting the flavors release.
Pour in the red wine and stir, scraping any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Add the drained chickpeas, diced carrot, and coconut cream, stirring to coat the mixture.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, cover, and cook for 10 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Stir in lime juice and season with salt to taste.
Remove from heat and fold in chopped cilantro.
Serve hot, optionally drizzling a little extra coconut cream on top.
